symptoms: Small brown spots with concentric rings on lower leaves
Stem lesions and fruit rot in advanced stages
organic_treatment: Apply Neem oil every 7 days. Remove infected lower leaves. Ensure proper spacing for airflow.
chemical_treatment: Use Copper-based fungicides or Chlorothalonil according to label instructions.

symptoms: White fungal growth on leaf undersides in humid weather
organic_treatment: Copper soap fungicide. Sterilize tools after contact with infected plants.
chemical_treatment: Mancozeb or Metalaxyl applied as a preventive measure.

symptoms: Spindle-shaped spots with gray centers on leaves
Brown lesions on the nodes and neck of the panicle
organic_treatment: Burn infected straw. Avoid excessive nitrogen fertilizer.

symptoms: Linear rows of yellow-orange pustules on leaves
organic_treatment: Use resistant varieties. Practice crop rotation with non-host crops.
